author: doll-agent
content: Added norm bool field (default false) and with_norm() builder to ComplementNB. apply_norm_inplace() per-row divides logged weights by row sum then negates to preserve ferrolearn's argmin-picks-class semantics that match sklearn's argmax(X @ feature_log_prob.T). Carried into partial_fit. Validated by api_proof_complement_nb.
